snippet.title: Pirate Software's Lies Are Still Catching Up to Him
snippet.description:
Pirate Software suffered one of the greatest downfalls in YouTube history in mid-late 2025. It all started when he abandoned his team-mates during a World of Warcraft classic stream. Then, he misrepresented Stop Killing Games to try and destroy the movement - ironically, giving it more power than ever. Consequently, his entire past was unraveled, from his claims about working at Blizzard, to his hacking knowledge, it was all called into question. Many thought after these controversies he would finally smarten up... they were wrong. Now, thanks to his lies about Ashes of Creation, he's in the news again for all the wrong reasons.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: BARUCH HASHEM ADONAI - Dunsin Oyekan ft. @theophilussunday..
snippet.description:
In Scripture, “Blessed is He who comes in the Name of the Lord” is the cry that welcomed Jesus’ triumphant entry. It is a sound that precedes divine visitation, the proclamation that the Lord is coming into a people, a territory, a nation.

Today, Baruch Hashem Adonai is a prophetic chant released over the earth. It is not merely about the second coming of Christ, but about a present invasion — the Lord coming again and again into homes, families, churches, cities, and nations, until His will is done on earth as it is in heaven.

This is the sound of nations lifting the Name of the Lord into the atmosphere.
From continent to continent.
From family altars to townhalls.
From the rising of the sun to the setting of the same.
As we bless the Name, we make room for His reign. As we lift the cry, we announce His rule. As we sing Baruch Hashem Adonai, we declare that the King is welcome.

Let the nations resound with the cry:
Blessed be the Name of the Lord.
Baruch Hashem Adonai.

Then those who went before and those who followed cried out, saying:
“Hosanna!
‘Blessed is He who comes in the name of the Lord!’
 Blessed is the kingdom of our father David
That comes in the name of the Lord!
Hosanna in the highest!” And Jesus went into Jerusalem and into the temple. So when He had looked around at all things, as the hour was already late, He went out to Bethany with the twelve. Mark 11:9-10

Blessed be the name of the Lord
From this time forth and forevermore! Psalms 113:2

snippet.title: ARCHSPIRE - RED GOLIATH (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
"After nearly five years, ARCHSPIRE return with their latest album, TOO FAST TO DIE, their most extreme and technically precise record yet. Following the JUNO Award–winning Bleed the Future (2021), the band push beyond the limits of speed and precision once again, solidifying their place as one of the most relentless forces in modern metal."

TOO FAST TO DIE out April 10th, 2026
PRE-ORDER THE ALBUM NOW: https://www.archspire.net

ARCHSPIRE is:
Oliver Rae Aleron - Vocals
Jared Smith - Bass
Tobi Morelli - Guitar
Dean Lamb - Guitar
Spencer Moore - Drums

'TOO FAST TO DIE' Track List:
Liminal Cypher
Red Goliath
Carrion Ladder
Anomalous Descent
The Vessel
Limb of Leviticus
Deadbolt the Backward
Too Fast to Die

Produced, Mixed, and Mastered by Dave Otero
Additional Engineering by Mike Low
Cover Art by Shindy Reehal
Album Layout & Design by Kevin Moore at Mindreader
Release Coordination, Management, Hype Man Brett Bamberger
Photography by Alex Morgan Imaging

RED GOLIATH

Lyrics

The hunger drives me forward to hunt the red goliath
Vine and concrete fight around me
Conquering the violent land that we lived on
before the limb of Leviticus came
Gone are the days that we thought we would see god
at the gate lifting up the ones who prayed
Faith turned to fear
when a spear from the sky drilled
down into the first skull
commandeering random bodies
Now in the calm of the sky ophidian recoil
we crawl along the ground we dominated
Left by it’s grace we can starve but we can’t die
Immortal human vermin stranded by their curse of pride
The sky limb bred us a vile mammoth
The red one our only prey to hunt
I must kill and eat it
I must flay the body that I dug out from the ladder
Become the hunter
The hunger drives me forward to hunt the red goliath
Vine and concrete fight around me
conquering the violent land that we lived on
before the limb of Leviticus came
A bear's skull melded with vulture wings
bison pelt and a panther spinal column
Apex with a thousand mouths
riddled with tongues and eyes
taken from land and sea
The ground breaks under its weight
Its network of throats echo death and decay
through vine and concrete into the caves
The limb bred every animal that wasn’t human into one
Flayed one lay before me
howling out to the sky void the name I once held
Gone are the days that we thought we would see god
at the gate
lifting up the ones who prayed
Faith turned to fear
when a spear from the sky drilled
down into the first skull
commandeering random bodies
Now in the calm of the sky ophidian recoil
We crawl along the ground we dominated
Left by it’s grace we can starve but we can’t die
Immortal human vermin stranded by their curse of pride
The reborn
I know they are not human
The mimic replicates her voice to torture me
It begins the begging
Simulated desperation clawing at my starving body
Nail her feet into the ground
to beckon the abominant prey
Its many tongue shifting in ravenous malice
engorged by the stench of the black fluid within the bait
In one last attempt
the bound desperate replicant
begins reciting past intimate memories
The flayed one lay before me
Howling out to the sky void the name I once held
Rain down your salivation
red one widen your jaws
engulf and consume this our offering
I release the blade to decapitate
I swing a razor pendulum built out of vine and relic metal
Then Down it came
one head of the beast
The rest ran away
I eat a mutant brain of dog and hawk and vomit up regret
The flayed one lay before me
Howling out to the sky void the name I once held
Rain down your salivation
red one widen your jaws
engulf and consume this our offering

MUSIC VIDEO CREDITS:
Directed & Edited by Savannah Bagshaw
First Assistant Camera Claine Lamb
Additional Camera Dean Lamb
Gaffer Andrew Johnson
Additional Footage Malcolm Pugh

Thanks to Empress FX for the use of their space for filming.

snippet.title: The Testaments | Trailer | Hulu
snippet.description:
Watch the Trailer for The Testaments, a new story set within the world of The Handmaid’s Tale. Join this new generation of powerful young women. Streaming April 8 on Hulu and Hulu on Disney+

An evolution of The Handmaid’s Tale, The Testaments is a dramatic coming-of-age story set in Gilead. The series follows young teens Agnes, dutiful and pious, and Daisy, a new arrival and convert from beyond Gilead’s borders. As they navigate the gilded halls of Aunt Lydia’s elite preparatory school for future wives, a place where obedience is instilled brutally and always with divine justification, their bond becomes the catalyst that will upend their past, their present, and their future.

snippet.title: George Michael - Careless Whisper (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
George Michael - Careless Whisper (Traducción al Español / Sub. Español / Letra + Lyrics)
Fecha de lanzamiento: 20/07/1984

🎶 "We could have been so good together"

Traducción al español y subtitulado por Leo + The Pears.

📌 Sigue escuchando "Careless Whisper":
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=izGwDsrQ1eQ

“Careless Whisper” es una balada sobre la culpa, el arrepentimiento y las consecuencias de una infidelidad. La letra narra el fin de una relación debido a un "susurro imprudente" (traición), expresando el dolor del protagonista por perder un amor valioso debido a sus propios errores.

#GeorgeMichael #CarelessWhisper #Pop #Soul

Gracias por ver. Espero que hayas disfrutado esta canción subtitulada.  
Si te gustó, comparte, deja tu like, hypea el video y comenta para apoyar el canal 🧡🍐

🎶 Letra original de "Careless Whisper":
[Intro]
Oh, woah, woah, oh

[Verse 1]
I feel so unsure
As I take your hand and lead you to the dance floor
As the music dies, something in your eyes
Calls to mind a silver screen and all its sad goodbyes

[Chorus]
I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Verse 2]
Time can never mend
The careless whispers of a good friend
To the heart and mind, ignorance is kind
There's no comfort in the truth, pain is all you'll find

[Chorus]
I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend (Shoulda known better, yeah)
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Post-Chorus]
Never without your love

[Instrumental Break]

[Verse 3]
Tonight, the music seems so loud
I wish that we could lose this crowd
Maybe it's better this way
We'd hurt each other with the things we want to say
We could have been so good together
We could have lived this dance forever
But now, who's gonna dance with me?
Please stay

[Chorus]
And I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Instrumental Break]

[Outro]
(Now that you're gone) Now that you're gone
(Now that you're gone) Was what I did so wrong, so wrong
That you had to leave me alone?

→ YouTube: https://youtube.com/@leoalanismusic

📱 Sígueme en mis redes:
